description: Product descriptionPurple round neck top, made of 100% viscose, with sequenced front panel and gathers on its sides, and dolman sleevesFittingRegularWash careMachine wash or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleachDo not wringDry in shadeMedium iron onlyStylish and sheek, this purple top from jealous 21's Jealous 18 range is a great evening wear. Perfect for weekend parties, the front sequenced panel made of mesh stitched to the main fabric in gathers adds to the top an absolutely feminine look, while the dolman sleeves accentuate the rounded beauty of your arms, enhancing your features. Made of viscose rayon, this top has a silky appearance and feel, but allows your body to breathe as well as it does in cotton weaves. Pair this top with jeans or short denim skirts, and stylish feminine sandals available in a wide range at myntra.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
